appraisal_events.evidence: « on n’invite jamais personne à moins que j’intervienne » … « retirant, après l’avoir jeté, l’appât de cette offre » … « Mon rôle est terminé, monsieur »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator ironizes Charlus’s self-important gatekeeping and his theatrical withdrawal of a social 'bait,' presenting him as manipulative and pompous.

status_effects.explanation: The narrator’s portrayal makes Charlus appear manipulative and theatrically self-aggrandizing, reducing his local esteem.
